code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut have = false
mut cur = 0
mut neg = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if have
      if neg
        nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
      else
        nums = list.push(nums, cur)
      end
      have = false
      cur = 0
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not have
    neg = true
    have = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    have = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if have
  if neg
    nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
  else
    nums = list.push(nums, cur)
  end
end

mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cm = 0
mut first = true
let m = list.len(nums)
mut j = 0
while j < m
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    cm = v
    first = false
  else
    if v > cm
      cm = v
    end
  end
  maxes = list.push(maxes, cm)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < m
  let v = match list.get(maxes, k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
